recipes.direct_semantic: Per-hand question answered by the full semantic action sentence.
recipes.compositional: Per-hand compositional slot QA plus holistic left/right compositional QA.
recipes.holistic_multiple_choice: Holistic left/right action recognition with paired multiple-choice options.
recipes.operator_holistic_constrained: Operator-level direct holistic action generation with the valid holistic action set in the prompt.
recipes.operator_compositional_constrained: Operator-level left/right slot generation with valid value sets in the prompt.
recipes.operator_compositional_stage1: Stage 1 curriculum: composition-only per-hand slot prediction.
recipes.operator_compositional_stage2: Stage 2 curriculum: composition first, then per-hand action sentence reconstruction.
